description_long: This sculpture depicts a mythical creature resembling a griffin, with the body and tail of a lion, large feathered wings, and the head of an eagle with an open beak. The figure stands upright on a rectangular plinth, its wings partially unfurled and detailed with feather-like textures. The surface is highly polished, giving it a glossy, almost reflective black finish. The creature's posture is dynamic, with one clawed foot raised and the tail curling around the base. The overall form is robust and solid, with intricate sculpting on the head, wings, and limbs. The sculpture exudes a sense of strength and vigilance, making it a striking focal point in any urban setting.
description: A glossy black griffin sculpture with detailed wings, eagle head, and lion body, standing dynamically on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the griffin's open beak, detailed head, and one raised claw, with the wings and tail clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the wings, the tail curling around the base, and the robust body structure.
description_view_2: Front-right view focusing on the griffin's chest, the other raised claw, and the curvature of the wings and tail.
description_view_3: Back-right view displaying the rear of the head, the back of the wings, and the tail's attachment to the base.
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban area, park, or plaza.
